marks_distribution: Unit 1: Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry - 7 Marks
Unit 3: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties - 6 Marks
Unit 4: Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure - 7 Marks
Unit 8: Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques - 11 Marks
question_paper_design: Formative Assessment Topics (Not in Summative): s & p Block Elements, The Gaseous State

syllabus_categories: B. Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances
visually_challenged_assessment: Same Evaluation scheme and general guidelines as Class XII
List of apparatus for identification: Beaker, tripod stand, wire gauze, glass rod, funnel, filter paper, Bunsen burner, test tube, etc.
Tasks: Odor detection in qualitative analysis; Procedure/Setup of the apparatus

project_assessment: Scientific investigations involving laboratory testing and collecting information from other sources

Suggested Projects include: Checking bacterial contamination, Purification methods, Water hardness testing, Foaming capacity of soaps, Acidity of tea leaves/juices, Rate of evaporation, Effect of acids/bases on fibers
